# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: services-server
  namespace: services-namespace
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      component: services
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: services-authorizer
  namespace: services-namespace
spec:
  server:
    name: services-server
  client:
    serviceAccounts:
      names:
        - frontend
      namespaces:
        - frontend-namespace
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: additional-services-server
  namespace: additional-services-namespace
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      component: add-services
  port: 2048
  proxyProtocol: GRPC
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: add-services-authorizer
  namespace: additional-services-namespace
spec:
  server:
    name: additional-services-server
  client:
    serviceAccounts:
      names:
        - extra-service
      namespaces:
        - extra-service-namespace
